summary: Ventas POS Odoo data source refactor testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI working correctly with pagination, filters, tabs, and product lines modal. No sync buttons visible (removed as expected).

backend_api.GET /api/ventas-pos paginated structure: PASS - Returns {data, total, page, page_size, total_pages}
backend_api.MISSING_ODOO_COMPANY_KEY for empresa_id=: PASS - Returns error_code with correct structure
backend_api.Pagination page=1,page_size=5: PASS - Returns 5 items, page 2 returns different items
backend_api.Filter by estado: PASS - All 4 estados (pendiente, confirmada, credito, descartada) work
backend_api.Search filter: PASS - ILIKE search on partner/vendor name works
backend_api.GET /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/lineas: PASS - Returns product lines with all required fields
backend_api.PUT /api/config/odoo-company-map: PASS - Upsert works, validation rejects empty company_key
backend_api.Venta data integrity: PASS - All required fields present, source='odoo'

frontend_ui.Date range filters visible: PASS - fecha-desde and fecha-hasta inputs present
frontend_ui.All 5 tabs visible: PASS - Pendientes, Confirmadas, Credito, Descartadas, Todas
frontend_ui.Tab switching works: PASS - Clicking tabs filters data correctly
frontend_ui.No sync buttons visible: PASS - Sync Ambission/Proyecto Moda buttons removed
frontend_ui.Table loads with data: PASS - 4671 records displayed with wider date range
frontend_ui.Pagination controls: PASS - Shows 'Mostrando X-Y de Z' with page navigation
frontend_ui.Page navigation: PASS - Clicking next goes to page 2 with different data
frontend_ui.Product lines modal: PASS - Cart icon opens 'Detalles de Productos' modal with product info

seed_data_creation: None - using existing Odoo data in PostgreSQL odoo schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ventas POS module refactored to read from PostgreSQL odoo schema. empresa_id=6 has company_key='Ambission' mapped. API returns paginated responses with {data, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. Product lines fetched on-demand via /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/lineas. Sync buttons removed from frontend. Frontend uses x-empresa-id header via axios interceptor.
